    private static final double MICRO_G_TO_METERS_PER_SECOND_SQUARED 9.80665E-6
    private static final double MIN_ANGLE_DEGREES -45.0
    private static final double MIN_DELTA_ANGLE_DEGREES -2.0
    private static final double MIN_DELTA_POS_METERS -0.01
    private static final double MIN_HARD_IRON -1.0E-5
    private static final double MIN_HEIGHT_METERS -500.0
    private static final double MIN_LATITUDE_DEGREES -90.0
    private static final double MIN_LONGITUDE_DEGREES -180.0
    private static final double MIN_SOFT_IRON -1.0E-6
    private static final double SMALL_MAGNETOMETER_NOISE_STD 1.0E-12
    private static final double TIME_INTERVAL_SECONDS 0.02
    private static final int TIMES 100
    private static final double VERY_LARGE_ABSOLUTE_ERROR 0.01
